name: Track AI search citations across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and Perplexity

nodes.name: Prepare AEO Prompts
nodes.notes: Builds 5 prompt variants per keyword × 5 keywords = 25 prompts per client per day.

nodes.name: ChatGPT Response
nodes.notes: Asks ChatGPT the prompt to detect brand citation.

nodes.name: Claude Response
nodes.notes: Asks Claude the same prompt for cross-engine citation tracking.

nodes.name: Gemini Response
nodes.notes: Gemini with Google Search grounding - tracks AI Overview citation probability.

nodes.name: Perplexity Response
nodes.notes: Perplexity API for citation + source tracking (highest citation value).

nodes.name: Merge AI Responses
nodes.notes: Merges responses from all 4 AI engines into one stream.

nodes.name: Analyze Citations
nodes.notes: Detects brand mentions, citation links, position rank, competitor SoV.

nodes.name: Z.ai GLM Recommendations
nodes.notes: Z.ai GLM-4.5 generates cost-effective optimization recommendations.

parameters.jsonBody: ={"model": "glm-4.5", "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You are an AEO/GEO optimization expert. Given citation analysis data, output 3 specific actionable recommendations as JSON."}, {"role": "user", "content": "{{ JSON.stringify($json) }}"}], "temperature": 0.5, "response_format": {"type": "json_object"}}

nodes.name: Store Citation Data
nodes.notes: Stores daily citation snapshot in Notion AEO Tracker database.

nodes.name: Citation Dropped?
nodes.notes: Triggers alert if brand was previously mentioned but now absent.

nodes.name: Alert Citation Drop
nodes.notes: Alerts team when brand citation is lost in any AI engine.

parameters.content:
## Track AI Search Citations (AEO / GEO)

Checks whether ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and Perplexity mention your brand when people ask about your topics, scores how often you are cited, stores the results in Notion, and alerts Slack when a brand mention disappears. Runs weekly or on demand, so you can measure your visibility inside AI answers, not just Google.

**Who's it for:** SEO and content teams (and agencies) who need to know if AI search engines cite their brand.

## How it works
1. Builds a set of prompts from your brand and seed keywords.
2. Sends each prompt to ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and Perplexity.
3. Analyzes every response for brand and competitor mentions.
4. Asks an AEO model for improvement recommendations.
5. Stores citation metrics in Notion and alerts Slack on any drop.

## Setup
1. Add credentials: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, Perplexity (Header Auth), Z.ai (Header Auth), Notion, Slack.
2. Open the Configuration node and set your brand, site URL, seed keywords and competitors.
3. Create a Notion database for citation data and select it in Store Citation Data.
4. Set your Slack channel.
5. Run once with Test workflow, then activate the weekly schedule.
